title: Code: 59. DB::Exception: Invalid type for filter in WHERE: Dynamic.
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe the improvement
allow using (trivial) Dynamic as UInt8 in where conditions.
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
26.1
### How to reproduce
```
create table a (data JSON) engine=Memory;
INSERT INTO a values ('{"a":{"a":true}}');
select data.a.a as _a from a where _a;
select data.a.a as _a from a where _a=true; -- works
select data.a.a as _a from a where _a; -- fails with exception
-- Code: 59. DB::Exception: Invalid type for filter in WHERE: Dynamic.
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, data JSONB);
SELECT (data->'a'->>'a')::boolean AS _a FROM test_table WHERE (data->'a'->>'a')::boolean = true;
SELECT (data->'a'->>'a')::boolean AS _a FROM test_table WHERE (data->'a'->>'a') IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Invalid type for filter in WHERE clause
